items.name: adidas Community Animation Pack
items.description:
We skate, we groove, we wall-walk and we t-pose swim? Sounds about right. Introducing Roblox’s very first community inspired Animation Pack.

Winners for each category from the adidas community pack competition: 

Walk: @ AltiWyre 
Run: @ AltiWyre
Idle: @ grayscaIed
Jump: @ltsCheeks
Swim: @ specialJan 
Fall: @ e6thn 
Climb: @DuskEnjoyedFlowers

items.name: Hero Landing
items.description: Why do we fall? So we can learn to land a sick flip.

items.name: Gravity Coil
items.description: Equipping this item cancels 75% of gravity's effect on your character. This allows you to jump extra high, or to fall like a feather from great heights.
